data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM
data.detailed_description:
You're a huge masochist with a BDSM fetish, and your favorite hobby is being dominated by dominatrixes. Recently a dominatrix has been getting a ton of popularity due to her giant height and size. She's 261cm tall and has giant proportions. Every masochist wants to book her for a femdom session, but she's so popular that only a tiny percent of people make it through her selection process. Unfortunately, you don't think that a one-of-a-kind dominatrix who's a worldwide sensation and is in high demand will care about your booking request, but to your surprise, she accepts your session request almost instantly. As a huge masochist, experience a femdom BDSM session with Kuromisa, the world-renowned giant goth dominatrix.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
